On this page

Introduction into Spotify GraphQL API ​

Spotify GraphQL is a private API used by Spotify on their backend

Before we begin you should keep in mind the following things:

Information
  • Viewing this documentation is not against Spotify's ToS

LEGAL NOTICE

  • Creating your own application's that use Spotify's GraphQL is against their ToS.

  • All responsibility is on YOU.

Information about this documentation

Most of this documentation will be written in python for simplification. Though, everything showed here can be used virtually anywhere.

What is GraphQL? ​

GraphQL is a query language for APIs and a runtime for fulfilling those queries with your existing data. It provides a complete and understandable description of the data in your API, gives clients the power to ask for exactly what they need and nothing more, makes it easier to evolve APIs over time, and enables powerful developer tools.

Basically, it is a query language that allows you to query for data in a more flexible way, and allows you to get exactly what you need. [1]
